data.title: Netflix, Ericsson, Hewlett Packard Enterprise And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Tuesday (CORRECTED)
Bernie Sanders Rallies Against Trump, Musk At Coachella: 'Economy That Is Working Very Well For The Billionaire Class'
data.description: Bernie Sanders made a surprise appearance at Coachella, where he encouraged the young crowd to rally against Donald Trump and Elon Musk.

data.title: Lowe's Buys Artisan Design Group, Bullish Analyst Explains Synergies
data.description: The acquisition of Artisan Design Group by Lowe's Companies for $1.325 billion is expected to boost topline growth and expand their Stainmaster brand.

data.title: AS China Weaponizes Rare Earth Edge In Tariff War, This Stock May Benefit
data.description: As China strives to weaponize its rare earth advantage in the tariff war with the U.S., this stock could be a beneficiary.

data.title: Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser Bets US Will 'Still Be World's Leading Economy' And Dollar 'The Reserve Currency' After Trade Uncertainty Settles
data.description: Citigroup topped Q1 estimates with $21.6 billion in revenue and $1.96 EPS, driven by growth in all five segments and reduced operating expenses.
